channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump responds to reports FDA chief Mark Makary could be fired: 'Know nothing about it'
item.description: Trump downplays reports he plans to fire FDA Commissioner Marty Makary over a vape approval dispute, telling reporters he knows nothing about it.

item.title: Something Canada's PM Carney Said About Obama Meetup Sparks a Lot of Attention About the 'Future'
AOC Sidesteps Talk of Presidential Bid or Senate Challenge
item.description: Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, D-N.Y., said she is focused more on advancing progressive policies than pursuing higher office, sidestepping questions ...

item.title: New: The Shocking Rise in Flash Mob Convenience Store Looting
